sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain at a level of 6 out of 10, and reports right ankle pain. The patient is limping. The patient reports pain relief with ibuprofen. The patient took ibuprofen this morning.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal. The patient's right ankle is swollen and bruised.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has an anterior talofibular ligament sprain and a right ankle sprain. The patient's symptoms are consistent with these diagnoses.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor prescribes an air cast. The doctor recommends ice application. The doctor orders crutches. The doctor prescribes ibuprofen. The doctor schedules a follow-up appointment in 14 days.
